source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for precise catalog UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese taxonomy labels, observation states, and numeric measurements.
layout: Dense 8px catalog grids, radial star dividers, spore-dust texture fields, compact observation cards, and quiet data panels with dark-mode parity.

prompts.label: Transparent earthstar motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only an earthstar fungus, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A mature earthstar fungus with tan star-shaped rays opened flat like a small woodland star, curled leathery points, a central dark umber spore sac, sandy beige undersides, tiny soil-grain texture on the dry outer skin, accurate fungal form, crisp edges, and natural matte material detail.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the whole star shape without cropping, viewed slightly from above so the celestial star geometry is clear.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves the tan star rays, dark spore sac, sandy woodland warmth, and realistic dry fungal texture.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no woodland background, no leaves, no moss, no second fungus, no props, no soil bed, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Earthstar" derived from the visible transparent earthstar fungus cutout.
Reference use: This board is the source reference for coding any future theme. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the visible earthstar fungus: sandy tan star rays, cracked leathery beige surfaces, ochre edges, dark umber spore sac, dusted soil speckles, and celestial star geometry.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Earthstar, Earthstar Fungus, Light Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese product UI examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, and short Japanese samples such as 星形菌, 土壌記録, 状態. Show calm catalog and observability UI guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top nav, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, small data map, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px radius cards and controls, quiet field-catalog dashboard language, radial star separators, spore-dust texture, sandy woodland neutrals.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals from the motif: spore milk, sand ray, open ray tan, cortex ochre, pore gold, rind umber, spore sac, deep soil, and soil ink. No unrelated colors.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no stock UI kit look, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Earthstar".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Earthstar light-mode design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent earthstar fungus cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Earthstar board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, celestial star geometry, spore-dust texture, field-catalog dashboard language, 8px radius, typography, spacing, and complete shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Earthstar, Earthstar Fungus, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Visual details: deep soil and soil ink backgrounds from the spore sac, readable foreground from spore milk, cards from dark umber, primary accents from sand ray and pore gold, status accents from cortex ochre and rind umber, subtle radial star dividers, spore-dust texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese product UI examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, and short Japanese samples such as 星形菌, 土壌記録, 状態.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top nav, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, small data map, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals from the motif: spore milk, sand ray, open ray tan, cortex ochre, pore gold, rind umber, spore sac, deep soil, and soil ink. No neon colors.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no stock UI kit look, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Earthstar".
